name: Sauteed Ampalaya Fruit
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and cut the Ampalaya into 2-inch lengths, then slice crosswise thinly. Remove the seeds.
2. Scald and shell the shrimp.
3. Slice the pork into small pieces.
4. Peel and slice the onions; peel and crush the garlic.
5. Slice the tomatoes.
6. In a small amount of oil, sauté the garlic, onions, tomatoes, pork, and shrimp, stirring constantly.
7. When the pork is half done, add water, patis, and MSG.
8. Bring to a boil.
9. When the pork is fully cooked, add the Ampalaya. Let it boil twice until the Ampalaya is cooked.
10. Add beaten eggs and stir once or twice before removing from the stove.
11. Serve hot with rice.
